title: T1 Preliminary Statistics - 2013 Edition (2011 tax year) - Canada.ca
content:
## Preliminary Statistics - 2013 Edition (2011 tax year)
The Preliminary Statistics presents data from personal income returns that were processed for the tax year two years prior to year of publication. For example, the 2013 edition of the tables analyze returns from the 2011 tax year, which generally had to be filed by the end of April 2013.
- Major changes for the 2011 tax year
- Major classification variables
- Description of items
- Description of preliminary tables

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
